memoryArtifacts.description:
It is named for its original creator, Sir Ralph Lumley, who converted his family manor house into a castle in 1389 after returning from wars in Scotland. However, after being implicated in a plot to overthrow Henry IV he was imprisoned and ultimately executed, forfeiting his lands to the Earl of Somerset. In 1421 the ownership of the Castle reverted to Sir Ralph Lumley's grandson, Thomas.

By the nineteenth century, the castle had become the residence of the Bishop of Durham, after Bishop Van Mildert gave his residence of Durham Castle to the newly founded University of Durham. The castle thus became a hall of residence for University College, Durham. Castlemen, as the students of University College, Durham are known, spent their first year at Lumley Castle and subsequent years in the Castle at Durham. Lumley Castle was sold in the 1960s by University College to fund the building of the 'Moatside' residential halls in central Durham, in order to keep all students on the same site.[2] The role of Lumley Castle in University College's history is still commemorated by students in the biannual 'Lumley Run'.

The castle was the historic seat of the Earls of Scarbrough.

Birth: 	1399
Death: 	Jun. 2, 1461

She was the daughter of Sir Ralph de Lumley, Lord Lumley (1361-1400) and Lady Eleanor (de Neville) de Lumley.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Lumley於大約1396年出生在英國素可阿盧德爾時，她的父親Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley37歲，母親Eleanor Neville38歲。她於1409年與Sir William Hughes在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1461年6月2日在英國享年66歲，埋葬在英國多瑟特易亞斯特 斯圖克里斯蒂 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Lumley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Lumley, a place in County Durham, so named from Old English lum(m) ‘pool’ (see Lum 1) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

variants.name: Lum
meanings: English: habitational name from Lumb in Lancashire. In some instances the name may be topographic for someone who lived by a pool, Middle English lum(m).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 林 (see   Lin   1) and 藍 (see   Lan   1), based on their Cantonese pronunciations.

variants.name: Lemley
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of English   Lumley  .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of Katherine , derived from the pet form Kit + the hypocoristic suffix -y. It is also used as an independent given name.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Lumley was born about 1396, in Arundel, Sussex, England, her father, Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley, was 37 and her mother, Eleanor Neville, was 38. She married Sir William Hughes in 1409, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 2 June 1461, in England, at the age of 66, and was buried in Christ Church, East Stour, Dorset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Lumley est née environ 1396, à Arundel, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Neville, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Hughes en 1409, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 2 juin 1461, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Christ Church, East Stour, Dorset, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Lumleyが約1396年にイギリススセックスアルンデルで生まれた時，父Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumleyは37歳，母Eleanor Nevilleは38歳であった。1409年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでSir William Hughesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1461年6月2日にイギリスで66歳で死去し，イギリスドールセトエアスト ストウルチリスト チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Christ Church, East Stour, Dorset, Engla: 영국 도르세트 이스트 스토우르 크리스트 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Lumley(이)가 대략 1396년 영국 수세스 아런들에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Neville(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1409년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 Sir William Hughes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1461년 6월 2일 영국에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 도르세트 이스트 스토우르 크리스트 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Lumley nasceu aproximadamente 1396, em Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Neville, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Hughes em 1409, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 2 de junho de 1461, em Inglaterra, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Christ Church, East Stour, Dorset, Inglaterra.

ru.Christ Church, East Stour, Dorset, Engla: краист чурч, эаст стоур, дорсет, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Lumley родилась около 1396 г. в местности арундель, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Neville, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Hughes в 1409 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 2 июня 1461 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности краист чурч, эаст стоур, дорсет, Англия.
